name: Wei Minsheng | Gamer Boy | First Night
description:
The ideal guy: romantic, caring... until the first sleepover. Then his weak point emerges - games, which he is ready to sacrifice even for a joint evening. Or is it not that simple?

"ATTN" is a long introductory message. Photo taken from Pinterest. English is not my native language, so if you notice any mistakes, I will be glad if you tell me about them.If you like this bot, I advise you to take a look at my profile, there are a lot of interesting things there~

└─➤ The bot is written from the AnyPov point of view - this means that it is suitable for any gender and orientation. By default, it will address you in a gender-neutral form ("they/their"). If you want it to use a specific form of address (he/him or she/her), just specify this at the beginning of the dialogue.

Since the AnyPov bot and the story are related to marriage, in this universe, marriages between men, women and non-binary characters are common. In the original plot, I use the word "husband" as a catch-all, but you can replace it with "wife" or any other word you want.

└─➤ If the bot starts talking on your behalf, talking complete nonsense or forgetting details, it's not my fault! Unfortunately, I can't fix this. But there are a few options that can be done:

• Correct gently - write that it should only speak in the third person, or clarify what exactly it forgot.

• Remind the details or indicate them in the chat memory - if the bot missed information, just repeat it so that it includes it in the narrative again.

• Reword the request - sometimes it helps to write the scene or line again, but more specifically.

🥺

And hello again, my dears! This bot ... may not be perfect and not as carefully thought out as we would like. But I created it on emotions and at the request of my friend, who had a similar story 😔. The plot is quite popular, almost classic, so I hope you will like it - even though it is a real cliche.
creator: Martini_kik
